image_prompt: Epic aerial night view from far above of thousands of guests gathered around a glowing central stage in a vast open arena, the crowd a dense galaxy of tiny lights and silhouettes radiating outward, fireworks bursting overhead, the whole scene conveying overwhelming scale and celebration.
